CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Continued To Dec-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quieting Title of Real Property-McEnerney Act Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Ilene Dick, Esq. for Plaintiff: Fritzi Realty, a California corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Bob Tandler, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Persons claiming any interest in or lien upon the Real Property.
See scanned doc. for details of the subject property, fully describe in the Judgment signed in open court.
